---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, resource, or capability for BOSC Community Library
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Public Benefit

Who is helped by this feature? Examples include educators, librarians, students,
public-sector administrators, accessibility users, or specific language communities.

## Problem

Describe the gap or limitation in the project today. If this affects a document
or page, link to it under `docs/`, `src/`, or the relevant root file.

## Proposed Solution

Outline the change you would like to see. Include:

- The user-facing behavior or content change.
- Any new files, routes, components, or resource entries.
- Licensing implications for any new third-party content.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why was this one chosen?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Clear definition of done.
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md`, `docs/` files, or templates as relevant).
- [ ] Existing tests / build still pass (`npm run build`).
- [ ] No regressions to existing public-sector content or governance documents.

## Additional Context

Add references, screenshots, mockups, or stable URLs that support the request.
